title: MT❯Divisions
content:
## Startup agility meets the traditional firm
To answer the needs of clients in the rapidly changing and interconnected business sphere, McCarthy Tétrault re-thought and re-imagined some of its service offerings and launched MT❯Divisions. MT❯Divisions represents a group of new businesses that have been either acquired or developed by our firm. Each business operates as a separate division and leverages business, data, technology, and other resources to provide solutions for clients.
MT❯Divisions currently has seven business lines under its auspices: MT❯3, MT❯Align, MT❯Corporate, MT❯Forge, MT❯iplus, MT❯Ventures and MT❯Version. Each embodies the proactive, technology-empowered nature of the enterprise and the ability to rapidly scale and launch innovative solutions ensures that our firm will deliver essential new services in the months and years to come.
- MT❯Division MT❯3 MT❯3 is Canada’s leading law firm specializing in providing advice and services relating to the management of digital information. We are a team of litigators, technical analysts, and project managers with extensive trial experience and a broad knowledge of electronic evidence.
MT❯3 is Canada’s leading law firm specializing in providing advice and services relating to the management of digital information. We are a team of litigators, technical analysts, and project managers with extensive trial experience and a broad knowledge of electronic evidence.
- MT❯Division MT❯Align MT❯Align lets our clients access a roster of top-tier independent lawyers to support their short-term or temporary legal needs. Whether it’s a sudden surge in workflow, or project work in an area in which your team is unfamiliar, we fit your unique needs.
MT❯Align lets our clients access a roster of top-tier independent lawyers to support their short-term or temporary legal needs. Whether it’s a sudden surge in workflow, or project work in an area in which your team is unfamiliar, we fit your unique needs.
- MT❯Division MT❯Corporate MT❯Corporate offers cost-effective services for your corporate compliance obligations. Powered by a dedicated team of highly-trained specialists from across the country, and enabled by technology, MT❯Corporate manages day-to-day compliance matters for companies throughout Canada.
MT❯Corporate offers cost-effective services for your corporate compliance obligations. Powered by a dedicated team of highly-trained specialists from across the country, and enabled by technology, MT❯Corporate manages day-to-day compliance matters for companies throughout Canada.
- MT❯Division MT❯Forge MT❯Forge is McCarthy Tétrault’s division for high-volume transactional legal work, powered by AI, scalable legal talent, and our Firm’s expertise. We help our clients handle routine matters with the same confidence they place in our premium offerings. We deliver speed, consistency, and cost predictability without compromising quality.
MT❯Forge is McCarthy Tétrault’s division for high-volume transactional legal work, powered by AI, scalable legal talent, and our Firm’s expertise. We help our clients handle routine matters with the same confidence they place in our premium offerings. We deliver speed, consistency, and cost predictability without compromising quality.
- MT❯Division MT❯iplus The evolution of McCarthy Tétrault’s Immigration Law Practice to the MT❯iplus platform combines the firm’s longstanding experience and excellence around immigration law with new technologies to enhance efficiencies. Our team delivers better results while keeping our distinct personal approach.
The evolution of McCarthy Tétrault’s Immigration Law Practice to the MT❯iplus platform combines the firm’s longstanding experience and excellence around immigration law with new technologies to enhance efficiencies. Our team delivers better results while keeping our distinct personal approach.
- MT❯Division MT❯Ventures MT❯Ventures is a unique company, providing the legal smarts and strategic counsel that startups need, plus direct access to a validated suite of services to help you grow and focus on the vision.
MT❯Ventures is a unique company, providing the legal smarts and strategic counsel that startups need, plus direct access to a validated suite of services to help you grow and focus on the vision.
- MT❯Division MT❯Version Our dedicated and seasoned team employs a tailored approach to service delivery which combines human know-how and advanced technology to ensure that multilingual legal translations are carried out with the care they require.
Our dedicated and seasoned team employs a tailored approach to service delivery which combines human know-how and advanced technology to ensure that multilingual legal translations are carried out with the care they require.
MT❯Divisions employs tailored approaches to client service delivery under a unified mandate of providing service excellence and value. MT❯Divisions builds successful collaborations with clients through:
- Deeply understanding the business needs, opportunities and challenges of the industries served to provide customized solutions;
- Completing projects more quickly to save time, meet deadlines and increase speed-to-deal;
- Streamlining, eliminating, systematizing and/or automating routine legal work; and
- Improving the overall quality, consistency and cost-predictability of legal and advisory services.
